item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
she's preetee... greetings online friends
was this a thing before that Ryan Gosling movie or did that put ideas in a bunch of dude's heads?
how could a person actually not need that
lots of unhinged going on here. the socks being on might be the winner for me
like the 'mist zone' at your local theme park
that's not how one is supposed to do it?
must be making club sandwiches
good thing he's handsome
we all know which Star Wars character won't be applying. yes of course Jabba the Hutt, he can't move very well.
this is messing with me
one of the best Halloween movies of all time
could have fooled me
"you know what a frog looks like, right?"
if it works, more power to em
relatable
mmm hmm
jealous
that's my time.. have a great weekend gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Aaand they did it again. Ukraine destroyed Toropets II missile depot tonight. Very big badaboom.
item.description:
FIRMS data: Toropets mmunition depot which was targeted several days ago is on top, the one which was targeted tonight is at the bottom.
Abaout the attack on Toropets I: https://uawire.org/ukraine-reportedly-uses-triple-loaded-neptune-missile-to-strike-russian-ammunition-depot-in-tver-region

item.title: Stupid human tricks
item.description:
Graceful dismount.
Ended as well as it could have!
The engagement
#Scorpion
I need this picnic table!
Both were at fault here
Safety Second!
Splort!
Russian hospitality #NSFWstyle
It’s Batgirl
I suspect this is in Minnesota, where I live
I think she’s gonna need a trip to the dentist
This one is very old, I’ve seen it many times, but it still makes me laugh. I’ve gotten my belt loop hooked on the dresser drawer handle more times than I’d like to admit.
The cop says “Nope, just leave her alone, let her go. She got this.”
I am certain they climbed over several warning signs on the way down. Doggie tried to warn them!
I honestly thought she was gonna lose an eye
This falls under the “hold my Cosmo” category
I upvote all comments for the first 72 hrs.

item.dc:creator: kitskinner19538

item.title: My best friend got hit by a car yesterday and they didn’t stop.
item.description:
My soul hurts, I feel irate, and I want to fix everything but can’t. she’s alive and recovering, but seeing her so broken and knowing the painful recovery journey that’s coming tears me apart. I just need to yell into the void a little. … Her wife had called me panicked saying she’s is getting medevaced to the hospital and she doesn’t know if she’s going to live. We spent all night taking turns being with her in the ER, waiting to get answers. They had to monitor her overnight because of the number of fractures and the internal damage she sustained. She’s not going to be discharged any time soon, but at least she’s stable and on the road to recovery with broken legs, shoulder, and organ damage. All because she was trying to help…a dog had gotten hit by a car in front of their home and she’d gone out to get it out of the road. The car that hit her didn’t stop. Cops haven’t found them. Uncertain whether they will because there may not have been any cameras in the area. They just left her there. Thank god her wife was around to call the ambulance. They hit my best friend and didn’t fucking stop. A human being and they kept going. I’m livid. The only emotion I’ve really let myself feel, because I know behind it is a flood of fear and tears. I just don’t know what to do. I’ve been helping her wife get things together and be here with her. I just want to fix it. She wants to go home and I hate telling her she can’t. Fuck that person for doing this to her. Thanks for letting me vent.
Cat tax Please send good healing energy her way. I love her so much. EDIT 1: thank you all so much for the overwhelming support. It means so much to me; I appreciate this community wholeheartedly. I will be taking the advise as best I can to heal with them, but also to take my own steps to find the person. Her wife called several places that may have had cameras (which stated they hadn’t even received a call from the cops), but no luck on footage so far. We’ll call around mechanics tomorrow morning. The healing love and energy was felt and I had the first coherent/normalish conversation with her in the past 24hrs. Will post more updates when I have some. Thank you.
item.dc:creator: colorlessyoshi

item.title: I love that he did the math of how much was owed before he responded with biting sarcasm because no way was he going to go back and asking is just insanity.
item.description: In August 1865, Jordan Anderson, a former slave, received a letter from his old master, Colonel P.H. Anderson, asking him to return to the Tennessee plantation to help restore it after the Civil War. Jordan, who had been freed by Union soldiers in 1864, was living in Dayton, Ohio, with his family. In response, he dictated a letter through his abolitionist employer, Valentine Winters, which was published in the Cincinnati Commercial. The letter humorously and pointedly requested 52 years' worth of back pay for himself and his wife, totaling $11,680, as a condition for his return. This amount was calculated based on $25 a month for 32 years for Jordan and $2 a week for 20 years for his wife, Mandy. Jordan's letter not only highlighted the absurdity of his former master's request but also underscored the harsh realities and injustices of slavery. He detailed his improved life in Ohio, where he earned a respectable wage, his children attended school, and his family was treated with dignity. The letter's deadpan humor and sharp wit made it a powerful piece of social commentary, illustrating the resilience and intelligence of former slaves. It remains a significant historical document, offering insight into the experiences and perspectives during the Reconstruction era.
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.dc:creator: Capinron

item.title: They just didn't know politics...
item.description: This was a shock, finding out this friend voted for Trump. They're so like-minded to me that I almost had a panic attack when they told me. They told me they were not going to vote for Kamala because they were "like their dad." There was an awkward pause, a lot of apologies from me from insinuating what they meant by that. It's Appalachia, and I wrongfully assumed the worst despite how well I know them. But no! It was nothing like that. This friend just didn't know a gosh darn thing about politics. We started talking about how deep policies go, did a little bit of political-leaning research, and now they've taken the step to change their registered party! From here on out, they're going to do their research and make decisions based on policies which matter to them, and not the popular candidate among their community peers. Way to go, bestie! I'm super proud of you. ♥
item.dc:creator: CuteLukePatoot

item.title: CAH vs Musk
item.description:
Copy pasta: In 2017, I paid Cards Against Humanity to protect a pristine plot of border land from Trump’s racist wall. But then an even richer, more racist billionaire—Elon Musk—stole my land and dumped his shit all over it. @ElonMusk owes me $100. #ElonOwesMe100Bucks www.ElonOwesYou100Dollars.com For reals: I saw someone else post about this, and was so excited since I was one of the 150k people who funded this thing back in simpler times! Back then it was a funny way to fight trump, (and get some fun cards), and the fact that it has become something real is just the icing on the cake! Yay for companies that follow through with their promises, and F those A-holes!
Sleepy work buddies for cat tax
item.dc:creator: EltaninDracoPwc
